name: Missed doctor appt for comp injury in West Jordan, will they deny?

mainEntity.name: Missed doctor appt for comp injury in West Jordan, will they deny?

acceptedAnswer.description: Risks denial or reduced benefits; shows non-compliance.[2] Reschedule immediately.[2] Key factors: follow all orders strictly; document reasons if unavoidable.[2] Explain to doctor/employer, get makeup plan, lawyer mitigates damage.[3] Insurers watch closely.
